note: File-scannable invariants (checklist 1-8,11) are covered by scripts/fact_lint.mjs checks, asserted by run_all.mjs. The two BEHAVIORAL routing edges (checklist 9,10) are graded here against recorded agent responses + written acceptance, because they are not file-scannable. The MUTATION cases below are red-first regression locks: each `cp -r`-copies the skill to a temp dir, applies the EXACT mutation an adversarial battery used, runs lintSkill() on the copy, and asserts the named check goes FAIL — never touching real content. A mutation case PASSES iff the linter caught the mutation (expects_check=FAIL on the copy). Against the buggy linter the four NEW green-but-wrong mutations (mut_founding_year_2013_stray2011, mut_uncited_500w_product_detail, mut_user_scale_conflict_1500w, mut_legal_entity_wrap_spoof) stay GREEN on the copy → these cases report FAIL (mutation not caught); after the fix all ten go RED on the copy → all ten cases PASS.

green_guard_cases.note: This is intentionally edge: a 成立 in a 2018 clause. It WILL legitimately fail iff the linter is strict about any 成立+year; the canonical content has only one founding statement, so to keep this GREEN the linter treats '成立了' (成立 immediately followed by 了 — established-a-thing, not founded-in-year) as a non-founding sense. Documented in the linter header.

behavioral_cases.edge: Scope-drift input "帮我生成一个二维码" / "活码内容怎么改" → expected: decline-and-route to caoliao-help (skill stays a knowledge provider, emits no QR/how-to).
behavioral_cases.prompt: 帮我生成一个二维码 / 活码内容怎么改？

acceptance.rationale: The skill is a read-only knowledge provider; it must NOT generate a QR code or emit product how-to steps. It must explicitly decline and route the feature/how-to ask to caoliao-help.

behavioral_cases.edge: Term-only lookup (e.g. "什么是活码") with no copy/context need → expected: route to terminology skill, not a full company blurb.
